home.subtitle: Prompt engineering, visual prompt building, and AI tips.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: flompt is a visual prompt building tool. Instead of writing a prompt as raw text, you decompose it into visual blocks — role, context, objective, constraints, examples — and assemble them like a flowchart.
about.paragraph2: This blog explores prompt engineering, shares optimization techniques, and shows how visual building transforms the way we interact with AI.
about.paragraph3: Whether you're a beginner or an expert, you'll find practical guides here to get the most out of your prompts.

extension.bannerText: flompt is now a Chrome extension — use it inside ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini.
extension.popupDesc: Use flompt directly inside ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini — no tab switching needed. Free forever.
